# MDE v1.3.16

## Features

* Refined the Markdown editor surface so normal editing reads more like a compact Markdown document while retaining BlockNote editing.
* Added clearer document hierarchy for headings, paragraphs, lists, quotes, dividers, inline code, and code blocks.
* Reduced idle BlockNote side-menu affordance visibility and hid it from read-only previews.
* Disabled browser spellcheck inheritance for the Markdown editor body to avoid distracting underlines on technical writing terms.

## Bug Fixes

* Stabilized user manual screenshots by replacing transient test workspace paths with deterministic manual labels before capture.

## Breaking Changes

* None.

## Maintenance

* Added unit coverage for editor render mode state and spellcheck behavior.
* Added E2E computed-style coverage for compact Markdown typography in the real Electron editor.
* Refreshed user manual screenshots to match the updated editor rendering.

## Documentation

* Added the editor typography requirement tracking document and recorded the implementation start.
* Updated generated user manual screenshots used by the public manual.

## Verification

* `npm run lint`
* `npm run typecheck`
* `npm run test:unit`
* `npm run test:integration`
* `npm run test:e2e`
* `npm run docs:screenshots`
* `npm run docs:build`

## Artifacts

* GitHub Actions will build and publish macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer/update metadata for this tag.
* The user manual Pages workflow can publish after GitHub Pages is enabled for the repository with GitHub Actions as the source.
